product_name: Natural Chemistry PhosFree Phosphate Remover (3L)

product_name: SeaKlear Chitosan Natural Clarifier (1 gal)
note: 2-pack gallon listing. Highly rated clarifier using chitosan from shellfish.

product_name: Jack's Magic 'The Yellow Stuff' Algaecide (2 lb)

product_name: Pentair Rainbow 320 In-Line Automatic Chlorinator

product_name: In The Swim 3-Inch Stabilized Chlorine Tablets (50 lb pail)
note: Top-rated trichlor tabs on Amazon with 100K+ reviews. In The Swim brand selected over Rx Clear as it has more verified reviews.

product_name: Morton Pool Salt 40 lb Bag
note: 91% 4+ star ratings on Amazon. Top-rated pool salt for SWG pools.

product_name: Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus Robotic Pool Cleaner (Wi-Fi)
note: 100K+ reviews but rated 4.2 stars — just below the 4.3 threshold. Included as the canonical mid-tier robotic cleaner; flag to user.

note: Premier model with dual-motor scrubbing; confirm ASIN matches current listing.

product_name: Betta SE Plus Solar-Powered Robotic Pool Skimmer

product_name: Betta SE Solar-Powered Pool Surface Skimmer (2023 Model)

product_name: Aiper Scuba N1 Cordless Robotic Pool Vacuum

product_name: Aiper Scuba S1 Cordless Robotic Pool Vacuum
note: Confirmed on Amazon but 4.0★ — below the 4.3 threshold. Mixed pro reviews. Consider removing or substituting.

product_name: Beatbot AquaSense 2 Cordless Robotic Pool Vacuum

product_name: Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra Cordless Robotic Pool Vacuum
note: Ultra variant's standalone ASIN not isolated from search results with confidence. Beatbot brand shows 4.1★ across line. Recommend checking beatbot.com direct.

product_name: Pleatco PA120 Advanced Replacement Filter Cartridge (120 sq ft)
note: Amazon's Choice; 4.6★ from 10K+ reviews. Fits Hayward Star-Clear Plus & others. Verify cartridge model matches user's filter.

product_name: Unicel C-8412 Replacement Filter Cartridge (120 sq ft)
note: 4.6★ from 10K+ reviews. Direct competitor to Pleatco PA120; fits same filters.

note: 4.5★ confirmed from Amazon.ca listing showing ASIN B000WQZCQO. Automatic float switch; 1745 GPH. Top-rated cover pump.

product_name: Wayne WAPC250 Submersible Pool Cover Pump (1/4 HP, 2950 GPH)
note: Amazon's Choice label; BobVila Best Overall rated. Confirmed ASIN from Amazon listing.

product_name: Purity Pool ULTD Ultra-Lite 18-Inch Professional Leaf Rake (Silt)
note: ULTD (Ultra-Lite Deep) rake found via Amazon search but no stable top-listing ASIN with 500+ reviews confirmed. Purity Pool rakes are niche professional products. Try ASIN B004VLB1QQ (ULRB) as alternative.

product_name: Purity Pool Pro-Lite 18-Inch Professional Leaf Rake (Silt)
note: PLSLT model found on Amazon UK (B004VLB4IG) and specialty retailers but US Amazon listing ASIN not confirmed with 500+ reviews. Pro pool market product.

product_name: Wall Whale Classic 18-Inch Weighted Pool Brush
note: 4.5★ from 4,729 reviews confirmed (Amazon.be listing shows exact count). Weighted tail forces brush against wall with 10x pressure.

product_name: Poolmaster Heavy Duty 30-ft Pool Vacuum Hose (1.5-inch, Swivel Cuff)
note: 4.3★ from 100K+ reviews. Note: this is the hose only; Poolmaster vacuum head sold separately (see Hayward SP1068 or similar for head).

product_name: Pool Skimmer Socks Fine Mesh 40-Pack
note: Top-rated fine mesh skimmer socks multipack. Confirm meets_bar via Amazon listing — many competitors in this category. Alternative: search 'pool skimmer socks' and filter by 4.5★+.

product_name: Big Joe Captain's Float No-Inflation Pool Lounger
note: New 2025 model with Caddie drink holder. 81% 4+ star ratings across Big Joe brand; 100K+ orders in past 3 months. Review count estimate — very new listing.

note: Big Joe Lux Collection listing not isolated with a stable ASIN and 500+ reviews. Big Joe pool floats are seasonal inventory; check current Amazon listings.

product_name: Kelsyus Premium Floating Recliner Lounger (Inflatable)
note: Confirmed via Amazon ratings page; mesh bottom, cup holder, backrest. Amazon Exclusive listing.

product_name: The Original Watermelon Ball Pool Toy
note: Iconic pool toy; dribbles underwater and bounces above. Full-size version. JR version available separately.

product_name: SwimWays Fish Styx Kids Pool Diving Toys (3-Pack)
note: Best available SwimWays dive toy set on Amazon with qualifying reviews. Wiggle/jiggle to pool bottom. Alternative: SwimWays SquiDivers (B0CCW4RM6B).

product_name: Dunn-Rite PoolSport Stainless Steel Basketball & Volleyball Combo
note: Confirmed on Amazon. 16-ft net spans pools up to 22 ft wide. Stainless hardware, shatterproof backboard.

product_name: GoSports Splash Hoop PRO Swimming Pool Basketball Game
note: 4.2★ — just below the 4.3 threshold. Target shows 4.2★. Widely recommended but does not meet bar. Consider GoSports Splash Hoop Elite as upgrade.

product_name: SwimWays 2-in-1 Pool Sport Combo Set
note: SwimWays 2-in-1 combo set ASIN not confirmed with 500+ reviews. SwimWays has multiple combo sets — verify current listing on Amazon.

product_name: POLYWOOD Long Island Side Table
note: POLYWOOD Long Island side table specific ASIN not confirmed with 500+ reviews in search. POLYWOOD tables are frequently sold direct. Check polywood.com or Amazon storefront.

note: Made in USA; 350 lb capacity; UV protected resin. Confirmed on Amazon. Graphite color also available (B0G2N9QKZP).

product_name: Best Choice Products Zero Gravity Reclining Patio Chair (Set of 2)
note: Amazon #1 Best Seller in zero gravity chairs; The Spruce Best Overall pick. Foldable, 300 lb capacity. Set of 2.

product_name: Grand Patio Outdoor Sling Chaise Lounge Set of 2 (with Wheels)
note: 4.4★ from 50K+ reviews. Woodgrain texture frame, mesh sling, 4-position recline, portable wheels. Top-rated sling chaise set on Amazon.

product_name: Purple Leaf 10ft Square Cantilever/Offset Patio Umbrella
note: 4.6★ from 50K+ reviews confirmed from Amazon listing. Wind-resistant up to 35 MPH. Consumer Reports top-ranked cantilever umbrella.

product_name: Ultimate Ears WONDERBOOM 4 Portable Waterproof Speaker
note: 86% of ratings are 4+ stars. IP67 waterproof, 13-hr battery, 360° sound. Amazon listing confirmed.

product_name: Bose SoundLink Max Portable Waterproof Bluetooth Speaker
note: Amazon listing confirmed (B0CVL1K7DX). Best Buy shows 4.8★ from 1,028 reviews. IP67, 20-hr battery, USB-C. TechGearLab #1 rated portable speaker.

product_name: YETI Roadie 24 2.0 Hard Cooler
note: YETI Roadie 24 is sold on Amazon (rated 4+ stars per Amazon search result) but the 2.0 version ASIN (B0F1B4FP49 is CA listing) varies by color. Search link provided; ASIN UNVERIFIED for specific US colorway. Confirm at amazon.com/yeti.

product_name: YETI Rambler 30 oz Tumbler with MagSlider Lid
note: Classic 30oz Rambler with MagSlider. Confirmed listing on Amazon. Multiple colors; ASIN may vary by color. Also newer B0DPBZY8LD available.

product_name: TempPro / ThermoPro TP-211B Wireless Digital Floating Pool Thermometer
note: Amazon #1 Best Seller in Pool Thermometers. 500ft range, IPX8 waterproof sensor, ±0.9°F accuracy. PriceHistory confirms 8.6/10 from 1,550 ratings.

product_name: Floating LED Pool Lights Rechargeable Color-Change Set
note: No single dominant brand/ASIN in this category; market is flooded with generic listings. Recommend filtering Amazon results by 4.5★+ and 1K+ reviews. Amazon Best Sellers in Pool Lighting is the best reference.

product_name: Floating Drink Holder / Floating Pool Cooler Multipack
note: High-volume generic category. Multiple listings qualify at 4.5★+ but no single canonical brand. Recommend searching Amazon and filtering by stars/reviews.

product_name: Suncast 99-Gallon Resin Wicker Outdoor Deck Storage Box
note: 99-gallon horizontal deck box with hinged lid. Home Depot shows 4.5★ from 577 reviews. Made in USA. Suitable for pool cushions, towels, toys.

product_name: D&D Technologies ML3TPKA MagnaLatch Series 3 Top Pull Gate Latch
note: 900+ bought/month on Amazon. Magnetic, key-lockable, child-safe pool gate latch. 4.4★ from 10K+ ratings per Amazon store page. Industry-leading safety latch.

product_name: D&D Technologies TruClose TCA1S3BTS Self-Closing Gate Hinges (Pair)
note: Regular duty, self-closing, for wood/vinyl/metal gates. Won't rust, bind, or sag. Confirmed ASIN on Amazon.

product_name: PoolGuard PGRM-2 In-Ground Pool Alarm
note: Confirmed ASIN on Amazon. Rated below 4.3★ threshold on Amazon (4.1★). Niche safety product with limited reviews. Industry standard for in-ground pool alarms but few alternatives exist.

product_name: PoolGuard DAPT-2 Door Alarm
note: Confirmed ASIN on Amazon. UL Listed UL 2017. 7-second delay alarm. Made in USA. Poolwarehouse shows 4.7★.

product_name: USCG-Approved 20-inch Ring Buoy with 100ft Floating Throw Rope
note: Cal June is the industry standard brand (sold via Leslie's, pool supply chains) but Amazon ASIN for ring buoy + rope combo with 500+ qualifying reviews not confirmed. Search Amazon for 'USCG approved ring buoy' and verify.

product_name: Surviveware Waterproof First Aid Kit (238-piece)
note: 4.7★ from 10K+ reviews confirmed. OutdoorGearLab Best Overall. Waterproof, well-organized. Good poolside first aid option.

product_name: Gizzmo Pool Skimmer Expansion Plug with Blowout Tube (9-inch)
note: Original Gizzmo brand; 1.5 or 2-inch skimmer threads MPT. Prevents plumbing freeze damage. Confirmed ASIN on Amazon.

product_name: Blue Wave Rectangular Leaf Net In-Ground Pool Cover (18x36 ft)
note: 4.2★ on Amazon — just below 4.3 threshold. Blue Wave is the dominant brand in this category. Multiple sizes available (16x32, 18x36, 25x45). Size ASIN varies. Check Walmart reviews where rating is higher.
